name: Fresh Tuna and Peas
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Tuna steaks, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse peas under cold water to separate them. Drain.
2. Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Saute onion, garlic, and parsley in oil until fragrant.
4. Stir in peas. Cook, uncovered, over medium heat for 4 minutes.
5. Stir in tomatoes, tuna, salt, and pepper.
6. Break up the tomatoes with a spatula or wooden spoon.
7. Cover and cook for 20 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
